---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new rule condition, CLI command, or engine capability
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Use case

What are you trying to accomplish? Describe the goal, not the solution — e.g. "I'm trying to block lateral movement from a compromised dev machine" rather than "I want an X condition."

## Example rule YAML

If this request involves a new condition, action, or policy syntax, show what you'd write if it were already supported:

```yaml
# example policy using the proposed feature
```

## Current workaround

What are you doing today to work around this gap? If there's no workaround, say so.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you've looked at and why they don't work for your use case.
